inputs: current readings are within normal range

The navigation error is low, suggesting the system is maintaining its course accurately. The position is slightly off, which could be due to minor inaccuracies in the navigation system. The time is within expected range, and the velocity is very low, indicating the system is stationary or moving at a very slow speed. The waypoint is at the start, which is expected at the beginning of a mission.
